creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Kotowski from comment #4)

/usr/ports/Mk/Uses/php.mk states:

  # If you are building PHP-based ports in poudriere(8) with ZTS enabled,
  # add WITH_MPM=event to /etc/make.conf to prevent build failures.

Could you try to add WITH_MPM=event to /etc/make.conf like suggested and report back your results here?

As it seems like this is a framework limitation not specific to the arcanist port, I'll close this bug for now.
